title: Crunchy Meal-Prep British Jammy Scones with Clotted Cream
description:
A macrobiotic-friendly twist on traditional British scones, served with a dollop of clotted cream and a touch of crunchy chili powder.
These scones make a delicious and healthy snack or dessert, perfect for meal prep or a quick breakfast treat.
instructions: Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
In a large bowl, whisk together almond flour, coconut sugar, baking powder, and salt.
Add in coconut milk, dashi extract, and chili powder, and mix until a dough forms.
Drop dough by rounded tablespoonfuls onto the prepared baking sheet, leaving about 1 inch of space between each scone.
Bake for 15-20 minutes, or until scones are golden brown.
Allow scones to cool completely on a wire rack.
To serve, split scones in half and top with clotted cream and jam.
Store scones in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 5 days.
